title: cacalia farinosa
intro: Cacalia farinosa, also known as woolly bittercress, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Cacalia farinosa, such as tinctures and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
